localized_texts.text: Set during the yesteryear of Malaysian history with stories in the 1950s, 1980s and 1990s, experience the dark history of the Colle Eastern Hotel as your night in this sinister hotel will become an experience you will not soon forget. Encounter vengeful spirits, evil agendas and mysterious hotel workers as you make your way deeper and further into the hotel.
Immerse yourself in a Mystical Dance Academy at The Curve or in a Haunted Hotel at The LINC KL!
This engaging haunted house experience is set in an old hotel that was built during the colonial era of the 1950s
Step into Hauntu M'sia First Immersive Horror Experience

This immersive horror experience is set in a prestigious dance academy during the ancient Sultanate era. You will roleplay to uncover the darkness that lurks within the academy that features Malay traditional art & performance. This engaging haunted house experience is set in an old hotel that was built during the colonial era of the 1950s. You will role-play and be guided by professional actors to discover the truth behind this sinister hotel and what lies in its dark hallways. Ep2 set in the 1950s, you are a group of tourists who are visiting the Colle Eastern hotel on the eve of the Merdeka celebrations as you’ve received a mysterious letter from a sibling inviting you to come. As the night goes on, you’ll soon uncover what dark secrets the hotel is hiding from its guests
Consider your scare tolerance - if you scare easily, this may be too intense for you.
It is recommended to be in good health and not under the influence of alcohol before participating
What’s included: Admission ticket at Hauntu The Linc
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing Counter

How to use: Once a ticket is purchased, please WhatsApp 6012-683 3628 for the steps and instructions to book your preferred timeslot. Additionally, we are reachable on social media (IG: @hauntumy & FB: Hauntu Malaysia)

Terms & Conditions: The minimum age to enter without adult supervision is 15 years old. Children 7 and under are strictly not allowed to enter. The experience may not be suitable for young persons between the ages of 8 - 14, but we do have some who enjoyed the experience. They will need to be accompanied by an adult if they are required to participate. You shall comply with all instructions as may be given by Hauntu from time to time and observe all signs and warnings displayed at Hauntu Premises. Hauntu prohibits the use of drugs and alcohol in the Hauntu Premises and has the right to refuse you entry to Hauntu Premises if Hauntu has reason to believe that you are under the influence of drugs and/or alcohol. If customers are late, they will be denied entry. Rescheduling to the next session is subject to available slots on the day itself. If customers arrive with fewer participants than the purchase amount, no refund will be available. Additional players will be charged accordingly. Every session is for min of 1-10 players, if you have less than 10 players, you are potentially to be grouped with strangers in the experience.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
